docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY TANGTHONGKHAM, DUANGKAMOL AS TO DEFENDANT YOSKAEW, NOPPADON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-30-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JAN-09-2012 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-09-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-06-2012 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO MAR-07-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "DEFENDANT PAID PLAINTIFF $600 IN CASH ON 9/6/12 FOR AMOUNTS DUE FOR THE MONTHS OF JUNE & JULY 2012. DEFENDANT WILL TRANSFER $300.00 INTO PLAINTIFF'S ACCOUNT BY SEPT 17, 2012 FOR AUGUST 2012 PAYMENT. THEREAFTER, DEFENDANT WILL PAY PLAINTIFF $300.00 ON THE 28TH OF EACH MONTH UNTIL JUDGMENT PAID IN FULL", PER JUDGE FISCHER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: AMANDA FISCHER. CLERK P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. DEPT (506)

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT YOSKAEW, NOPPADON HEARING SET FOR JUN-13-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: MAY-12-2011 AS TO DEFENDANT YOSKAEW, NOPPADON
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF FEB-09-2012 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-10-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR APR-03-2014; JUDGMENT DEBTOR NOPPADON YOSKAEW FAILED TO APPEAR. WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDERED ISSUED. BAIL SET AT $1,500.00. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-15-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT SATISFIED. ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED ON 5/15/14 BY CREDITOR. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. BENCH WARRANT ISSUED ON 4/3/14 IS RECALLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURN MAIL- ORDER OF EXAMINATION OFF CALENDAR - SENT TO DEFENDANT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-30-2011 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-13-2011 IS CONTINUED TO JUN-23-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT TO RETURN WITH 3 MONTHS OF FINANCIAL DOCUMENTS; RENT, MORTGAGE, BANK STATEMENTS, UTILITIES, PAYROLL STUBS, ETC. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-31-2012 IS CONTINUED FOR FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-06-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF STATES THAT THE DEFENDANT DEPOSITED $900.00 INTO HER BANK ACCOUNT TODAY. PAYMENTS ARE NOW CURRENT. CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 6, 2012 AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT. BENCH WARRANT ISSUED RE: CSM - 11-836512 IS WITHDARWN. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR NOV-21-2013; JUDGMENT DEBTOR NOPPADON YOSKAEW FAILED TO APPEAR. WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDERED ISSUED. BAIL SET AT $500.00. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DEBORAH DANIOFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SUBPOENA ISSUED TO NOPPADON YOSKAEW, 2534-21ST AVE.,SF,CA. 94116 (415) 400-6737.

APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-04-2013 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-30-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506."CONTINUED OEX - 2 CASES; $300+$800+$1000 = 3 CHECKS GIVEN TODAY TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR (POST DATED)" PER JUDGE MITCHELL. SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JAN-02-2014 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO APR-03-2014 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. BENCH WARRANT ISSUED ON 11/25/13 IS RECALLED. DEFENDANT PAY PLAINTIFF $800 IN CASH TODAY IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF GIVES BANK ACCOUNT NUMBER AND BALANCE OF HIS DEBT. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF $1000 ON 1/20/14, $1000 ON 02/20/14, $1000 ON 03/20/14 AND THE REMAINDER OF THE DEBT BEFORE 04/03/14 BY DEPOSITING TO PLAINTIFF'S BANK ACCOUT. JUDGMENT SHOULD BE PAID IN FULL BY 04/03/14. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT YOSKAEW, NOPPADON
